# rubrik_gcp_service_accounts (Data Source)

The `polaris_gcp_service_accounts` data source returns the GCP service accounts
that RSC has discovered for a cloud account. It exposes the same catalog the RSC
UI uses when selecting a service account for a GCP cloud cluster, so the service
account email required by the `rubrik_gcp_cloud_cluster` resource can be
discovered at plan time instead of hard-coded.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cloud_account_id` (String) RSC cloud account ID (UUID).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) SHA-256 hash of the service account emails returned.
- `service_accounts` (Attributes Set) GCP service accounts available for the cloud account. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--service_accounts))

<a id="nestedatt--service_accounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `service_accounts`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) Service account email.
- `name` (String) Service account display name.
